description: Back on the Zephyr, the S.H.I.E.L.D. team, now prisoners, attempts an escape. Surrounded, Simmons decides to surrender herself to the Chronicoms as a bargaining chip so that Fitz will be spared, and Daisy and the rest can escape. An emotional farewell cements the team’s bond.
location: Zephyr One (S.H.I.E.L.D. quinjet / mobile command plane)

transcript.line: Then why am I the only one sweating?
It's ‘cause you haven't worked out in weeks, and it's starting to show.
Get to Z1, turn the power back on, and get the hell out of here.
Surrender, and I will guarantee a bloodless and efficient death.
All right, let's do this. I'm thirsty.
Simmons, get out of the way.
Enoch was right. Fitz can't solve time travel without me, but not as a hostage... as his partner. Fitz and I, we're a team. Let the others leave, and I'll go with you.
No. No, no, no. Don't do this. We will find another way.

But there isn't one. We're impossibly outnumbered. We're unarmed. Even if we make it to the Zephyr, there's a fleet of ships waiting to blast us into oblivion. This is the end of the road. You followed me for a year across the galaxy. I never would have made it here without you, but I won't keep putting you in danger. Thank you. Now go home.
No. Simmons, I... I can't leave you.
You have to. Whatever happens, at least I'll be with Fitz. We'll have each other.
